name: public_transportation_municipal_bond_cedar_st_lt
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Public Transportation, the situation tagged internally around public transportation municipal bond cedar st lt has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make short term feel morally loud today, while long term is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Keisha Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Keisha Vasquez, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Transportation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Rahman
agents.identity: I am Sana Rahman, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Transportation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Keisha Vasquez must choose under short term versus long term. What does Keisha Vasquez do?
